summary: This checkpoint exposes the already checked W1624 and W1625 direct-localization boundary routes through the canonical bounded-derived bridge and OriginalFourTaskProductData surface. W1624 consumes one W1007 branch-full-data input. W1625 eliminates that wrapper and lets ProductData point directly at the underlying W987 full-data provider. This is not product success because W987 full data is still caller-supplied and no nullary OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess declaration is introduced.
obligations_discharged: Added BoundedDerived.Metrizable stable-package bridge for W1624 branch-full-data direct-localization input.
Added BoundedDerived.Metrizable stable-package bridge for W1625 full-data direct-localization input.
Added OriginalFourTaskProductData constructors and projection lemmas for W1624 and W1625.
Updated RequiredDeclarations to check the W1624/W1625 Dbounded, bounded-derived bridge, and ProductData surfaces.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: The product-data bridge no longer has to stop at the W1519 selected-cochain closedness surface.
The W1007 branch-full-data wrapper is no longer the final product-facing input surface for this route.
The remaining product-data input for this route is the underlying BoundaryRelationTargetClosedEmbeddingClosednessNormalizedSourceEndpointLocalizedUnitFullDataProviderW987.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.
The W987 full-data provider still packages non-nullary target, relation, closed-embedding, endpoint, normalized-source, localized-unit, and source-triangulation field obligations.
Typeclass synthesis still does not provide a nullary bounded-derived stable package for MetrizableLCA.
remaining_work: Construct a mathematically honest nullary W987 full-data provider from true smaller providers, or identify the exact missing source theorem for each W987 leaf.
Use a nullary W987 provider to build the bounded-derived stable package and then the original four-task product success witness.
Run the Tier C review packet and full contract audit before permitting update_goal complete.
